title: Object-Oriented Architecture and Capstone Delivery · Runtime Lens: Oop Layered Boundaries
summary: Deliver an extensible community-resource workflow with a domain core, replaceable boundaries, migrations, and operator evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop layered boundaries increment in a production-shaped object-oriented capstone. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate domain rules, application orchestration, infrastructure adapters, and user interface concerns with explicit dependencies.
Verify round-trip, version, missing-field, unknown-field, and invalid-data behavior at serialization boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
